title: Tiny On-Disk Substitutive Artifact Fixture
W_low_format_honest: Blocked int8 quantized, stored as uint8 (1 byte/element). NOT GGUF Q4_K_M (0.5 bytes/element, pending). NOT toy harness fp32 (4 bytes/element). Real nibble-packing pending.
margin_note: Memory margin is REAL (negative) based on actual W_low artifact bytes. Negative margin because uint8 (1 byte/element) > Q4_K_M (0.5 bytes/element). True Q4_K_M packing would yield ~2.29MB total, positive margin.
what_passed: W_ref absent (not loaded by artifact loader)
Residual encoded present and loads correctly
what_is_partial: W_low is NOT true Q4_K_M packed format
W_low stored as uint8 at 4.63MB (not 1.09MB Q4_K_M)
If true Q4_K_M (1.09MB) were used: total would be ~2.29MB, margin ~+2.07MB

recommended_next_phase.phase: Phase 31T or continue with artifact_write.py nibble packing fix
recommended_next_phase.title: Fix W_low nibble packing to achieve true Q4_K_M format
recommended_next_phase.rationale: Negative margin means current uint8 storage is heavier than Q4 budget. Must fix nibble packing before memory viability can be claimed.
